title: Types of NoSQL Databases Quiz
description: Test your fundamental knowledge about different types of NoSQL databases and their role in modern web applications.

questions.question: Which type of NoSQL database is the most popular for general-purpose web development, storing data in JSON-like formats?
Which of these is the simplest and fastest type of NoSQL database, often used for caching and sessions?
Which type of NoSQL database is famously used for social networks and recommendation engines, specializing in representing complex connections?
What is 'Polyglot Persistence' in modern backend architecture?
options: A way to encrypt files using a secret key.
Using multiple different types of databases (e.g., SQL + NoSQL) within the same application to solve different problems.
A way to automatically compress files.

questions.question: Which type of NoSQL database is famously used for time-series data and analytics on massive datasets (like Facebook's activity feed)?
